LanguageData.Ammo_Mech_Charged.label: Mech Charged cartridge
LanguageData.Ammo_Mech_Charged.description: Charged shot ammo used by mechanoid weaponry.
LanguageData.Ammo_MechShell_Incendiary.label: mech shell (Incendiary)
LanguageData.Ammo_MechShell_Incendiary.description: Large shell used by mechanoid cannons and heavy weapons.
